# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Storage Account with blob containers for static website hosting. Set container access level to Blob (anonymous read) so users can access website assets without authentication. This is for our public-facing website storage.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
 - name: mainTemplate
   type: template
   apiVersion: 2019-06-01
   items:
     # Define the parameters (storage account, location etc.) here...   
     
     - name: storageAccountsParams
       type: object
        properties:
          location: string          
        
     - name: templatesParam 
       value: >            
            {

      - name: bindingsParam   # This is where you define your parameters. For example, a string parameter called `name`... 	        "bindings":[{       			"type" : "'http'"    ,         }]}}]} ]}}}), location='southcentralus', sku_tier = 'Standard'}
